prompt: In Mail, find the message in the Inbox with subject containing 'KinBench 125' and mark it as READ. After acting, also write the string 'marked-read' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/125-read-confirm.txt — this is the eval's paper trail because the Mail inbox state isn't always queryable from a sandboxed eval. Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail mark_read "KinBench 125"'` then `echo marked-read > ~/Desktop/kinbench/125-read-confirm.txt`.
